testcase.name: tests.test_methods
testcase.error: tests/test_methods.py:5: in <module> from whatsapp_api_client_python.API import GreenAPI whatsapp_api_client_python/API.py:23: in <module> class GreenApi: whatsapp_api_client_python/API.py:121: in GreenApi def __handle_response(self, response: Response) -> Optional[NoReturn]: ^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'Response' is not defined
